pi_items.source: Task setup scripts and data files are missing, making the row count unverifiable.
Web search confirms this is a valid real-world ISBN for the book Clean Code.
Web search confirms Robert C. Martin is the author for ISBN 978-0132350884.
Web search confirms Clean Code was published in 2008.
Task setup scripts and data files are missing from the directory.

privileged_info_summary: The test case uses realistic reference data (ISBN 978-0132350884 corresponds to Clean Code by Robert C. Martin, published in 2008). However, the specific expected row count and dataset path could not be independently verified because the setup scripts and raw data files are missing from the environment directory.
